linkedin.author: Rohan Mehta
linkedin.text: The bank's relationship managers are responsive but the mobile app keeps logging me out every few minutes. Annoying for business accounts.

linkedin.author: Priya Nair
linkedin.text: Loved the new fixed deposit rates announced this quarter. Sales team explained the options clearly.

linkedin.author: Anonymous
linkedin.text: bakwas service, total waste, who even reads this lol

linkedin.author: Karthik Rao
linkedin.text: Security concern: I received an SMS OTP for a transaction I never initiated. Support said it was a glitch. This is serious.

google_review.author: Sneha P
google_review.text: Increasing my credit card limit through the app is extremely confusing. The flow has too many steps and no clear confirmation.

google_review.author: Amit J
google_review.text: App crashed during a fund transfer and money was debited but not credited for 2 days. Tech needs to fix this urgently.

google_review.author: Meera
google_review.text: Branch staff were super helpful, sorted my KYC in 10 minutes.

google_review.author: ghost123
google_review.text: asdf asdf random nonsense bakwas review

app_store.author: investor_07
app_store.text: The UI for the investments dashboard is cluttered. Charts overlap on smaller iPhones. Hard to read my portfolio.

app_store.author: dailyuser
app_store.text: Fingerprint login fails about half the time and I have to type the full password. Please fix the biometric flow.

app_store.author: happycustomer
app_store.text: Best banking app I have used, bill payments are instant.

play_store.author: Suresh K
play_store.text: Cannot reset my MPIN. The reset link in the app does nothing. Customer care had me waiting 40 minutes.

play_store.author: Divya R
play_store.text: Loan EMI section shows the wrong outstanding amount. This is a business/finance data accuracy problem.

play_store.author: spam_bot
play_store.text: click my link free money bakwas spam

play_store.author: Naveen
play_store.text: Dark mode would be nice. Also the font is a bit small for older users.
